backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the car price prediction system, defining types for attendance records, car specs, and price prediction results, along with integrating file storage, authorization, and prediction history using a Map.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades attendance records from the old schema (with a single timestamp) to the new schema (with separate presentTime and leavingTime optional fields).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—fixing attendance name display order and adding present/leaving time fields—to their relevant source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted summary of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and notable changes of every component, hook, and configuration file in the React frontend.
frontend/COLAB_FRONTEND_RUN_GUIDE.md: Guide explaining how to run only the React frontend in Google Colab, noting that the Motoko backend cannot run in Colab and providing step-by-step Node.js setup instructions.
frontend/COLAB_PYTHON_MEGA_CODE.py: Self-contained Python script for Google Colab that generates a synthetic car dataset, trains five ML models, and provides an interactive widget-based car price prediction form with USD and INR output.
frontend/COLAB_PYTHON_RUN_GUIDE.md: Step-by-step guide for running the standalone Python car price prediction ML script in Google Colab, clarifying it is separate from the Internet Computer backend.
frontend/COMPLETE_CODE_COPY_PASTE.md: Documentation offering two paths for using the project: a quick Colab-only Python ML option and a full Internet Computer application export, with instructions for both.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app with SEO meta tags, Open Graph, and Twitter Card tags configured for the Car Price Prediction System.
frontend/MEGA_FILE_EXPORT.md: Describes the mega-file export format for the project and provides instructions for reconstructing the full project from a single bundled text file.
frontend/mega-export.txt: A generated single-file export containing the complete source code of the Car Price Prediction System (frontend and backend) with delimited file markers for reconstruction.
frontend/PRODUCTION_DEPLOYMENT.md: Production deployment guide for the Car Price Prediction System on the Internet Computer, covering pre-deployment checklists for code quality, user flows, UI/UX, and SEO verification.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Standard robots.txt allowing all crawlers, specifying the sitemap URL and a crawl delay of 1 second.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap with a single entry for the car price predictor homepage, set to weekly change frequency and priority 1.0.
frontend/README.md: Developer documentation for the Car Price Prediction System, describing quick start options including running the ML model in Google Colab or setting up the full Internet Computer application locally.
frontend/scripts/generate-mega-file.ts: TypeScript script that recursively walks the project directory and concatenates all matching source files into a single mega export text file with clear delimiters.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages authentication state via Internet Identity, handles multi-view navigation (home, hub, chess, piano, etc.), and conditionally renders profile setup or the main app content.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: Renders an 'About' section for a car price prediction project, displaying a project overview, founder info, and contact email fetched via a query hook.
frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.t: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/AttendanceMonito: A face-recognition attendance system component that uses face-api.js and a webcam to register faces, mark attendance/leaving, and display attendance records in a table.
frontend/src/components/ChessGame.tsx: A fully functional two-player chess game component with move validation, check/checkmate/stalemate detection, castling, en passant, and piece capture tracking.
frontend/src/components/DepressionRelief: A mental wellness component offering rotating affirmations, suggested activities, a mood scale selector, and an interactive guided breathing exercise.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component displaying copyright year, a caffeine.ai attribution link, and a GitHub icon link.
frontend/src/components/GesturePiano.tsx: Composes the main gesture piano UI by combining a webcam feed for hand detection, a piano keyboard display, and a volume control into a single layout.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: A sticky app header with logo, Internet Identity authentication (login/logout), navigation links for different app views, and a jumping profile photo centered in the bar.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Landing page hero section with a typewriter headline effect cycling through words, parallax animated orb background, floating particles, and a CTA button that triggers the prediction flow.
frontend/src/components/Hub.tsx: Navigation hub component that displays feature cards (Chess, Photo Studio, Piano, Car Price AI, Wellness, Attendance) with an animated particle canvas background, allowing users to navigate to different app views.
frontend/src/components/JumpingProfilePh: A bouncing circular profile photo button that opens a ProfilePhotoModal when clicked, supporting three size variants.
frontend/src/components/LoginForm.tsx: Authentication form that triggers Internet Identity login via a custom hook, showing loading state and toast notifications for success or failure.
Full-viewport canvas overlay that renders expanding multi-ring color wave animations following mouse movement, using requestAnimationFrame and pointer-events:none so it never blocks interaction.
frontend/src/components/MyPhoto.tsx: Photo Studio component that lets users upload an image, apply one of eight canvas-based pixel filters (grayscale, sepia, neon, vignette, etc.), and download the result, alongside a developer profile hero section.
frontend/src/components/PianoKeyboard.ts: Renders a static two-octave piano keyboard (C4–C6) as an SVG-like div layout, visually highlighting white and black keys that appear in the `activeNotes` prop.
frontend/src/components/PianoPage.tsx: Full interactive piano page supporting mouse/touch and computer keyboard input to play notes across C4–C6, using the `useAudioPlayer` hook for sound and tracking active notes in state.
frontend/src/components/PredictionForm.t: Form component for submitting car specifications (brand, year, mileage, fuel type, etc.) and optional photos to get an ML-based price prediction, displaying the result with confidence score formatted as a percentage.
frontend/src/components/PredictionHistor: Displays a list of past car price prediction entries fetched via `useGetPredictionHistory`, showing car specs, photo thumbnails, predicted price, and confidence badge for each record.
frontend/src/components/Products.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/ProfilePhotoModa: Fullscreen modal that displays a profile photo with a blurred backdrop, supporting close via Escape key or backdrop click and preventing body scroll while open.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Form card for new users to enter their name and email to create a profile, submitting via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation with basic validation and toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/RunnerGame.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/SEOHead.tsx: Injects a JSON-LD structured data script tag into the document head describing the Car Price Prediction application for search engine optimization.
Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/VolumeControl.ts: A volume control UI component with a mute/unmute icon button and a slider, displaying the current volume percentage. The icon changes based on volume level (muted, low, medium, high).
frontend/src/components/WebcamFeed.tsx: A React component that manages camera feed, hand tracking, gesture detection, and audio playback, triggering piano notes based on detected hand gestures. It also displays FPS, tracking status, and audio loading state.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control with an admin token if present. It invalidates and refetches dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioPlayer.ts: A React hook that provides piano-like note playback using the Web Audio API with additive synthesis and ADSR envelopes, supporting play, stop, and volume control. Falls back to oscillator-based synthesis with predefined note frequencies.
frontend/src/hooks/useHandTracking.ts: A React hook that loads MediaPipe Hands from CDN and performs real-time hand landmark detection on a video element, drawing landmarks on a canvas and returning tracking state. It manages the animation loop and cleans up when tracking is deactivated.
frontend/src/hooks/useIconDance.ts: A React hook that returns an event handler which temporarily adds an `icon-dance` CSS animation class to the nearest SVG icon inside the target element. The class is removed after the animation ends or after a 800ms safety timeout.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider for ICP, managing login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient. Exposes a `useInternetIdentity` hook for accessing identity state and login/clear actions.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for user profile, contact info, car price prediction, prediction history, and attendance operations (register face, mark present/leaving) using the actor pattern with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useTutorialState.ts: Empty file with no content, likely a placeholder for a tutorial state management hook.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind directives, defining CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using OKLCH colors, and declaring keyframe animations for floats, glows, card entrances, and gradient shimmers.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/gestureRecognition.ts: Detects hand gestures from MediaPipe landmarks to map hand horizontal position and extended finger count to musical notes across a 25-note range (C4–C6) with per-hand debouncing.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH-based design tokens, custom border radii, sidebar and music-themed colors, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing two pending fix requests: correcting inverted name display in the attendance list UI and adding present/leaving timestamp fields to attendance records.
